entries.title: Coding profile added
entries.body: New waybar profile with docs, roadmap.sh, language refs, git, dev tools, AI and Q&A groups.

entries.title: Git contribution heat strip
entries.body: A last-week commit heat strip on the left bar. Shows your green path; today is highlighted.

entries.title: Contextual greeter
entries.body: The system receives you with a random phrase pulled live from the GitHub repo. No fixed text.

entries.title: What's new center
entries.body: You are reading it. Open it anytime from the system menu to see BlackNode changes.

entries.title: Announcing What's New
entries.body: BlackNode now ships a changelog center. Updates are written once to the repo and shown to you a single time. Open System menu -> What's New to review. No spam, no repeat.
